body:
# Data Availability Statement — FlashAttention-4 White-Box Runtime Model

The datasets generated in this study — real NVIDIA B200 FlashAttention-4 forward-pass runtime measurements, the synthetic configuration matrix, NCU SpeedOfLight profiles, the predictor source code, and figure source data — are available from the corresponding authors upon reasonable request. A public repository deposit with persistent identifiers is planned before final submission; no accession numbers or DOIs are available at this time.

The figure source files and prediction CSVs are included in the paper bundle. Public datasets and hardware-rate assumptions reused in the analysis were obtained from cited arXiv preprints (Zadouri et al., 2026; Jarmusch & Chandrasekaran, 2025/2026).

*Note: the target venue is unspecified, so this is a general data-availability statement. It must be replaced with a venue-specific statement and real repository identifiers before submission.*
summary: Data availability statement for generated FlashAttention-4 B200 runtime measurements, synthetic configuration data, NCU profiles, predictor code, and figure source data.
title: Data Availability Statement — FlashAttention-4 White-Box Runtime Model
